title: Workato Genie
description: Represents a Workato AI agent (genie) — an entity that uses large language models and recipe-backed skills to autonomously handle tasks and answer questions. Genies are configured with instructions, an AI provider, skills, and knowledge bases.

id.description: Unique integer identifier of the genie within the workspace.

description.description: Human-readable description of the genie's purpose and capabilities.

folder_id.description: ID of the workspace folder that contains this genie.

state.description: Current operational state of the genie.

instructions.description: Natural language instructions that define the genie's behavior, persona, and decision-making approach.

ai_provider.description: The AI model provider powering this genie (e.g., openai, anthropic, workato).

shared_account_id.description: ID of the shared account providing credentials for the AI provider.

custom_oauth_key_id.description: ID of the custom OAuth profile used for AI provider authentication.

matrix.description: Advanced configuration settings for the genie's behavior and model parameters.

skills.description: List of skills (recipe-backed tools) assigned to this genie.

knowledge_bases.description: List of knowledge bases assigned to this genie for contextual data retrieval.

user_groups.description: Identity provider user groups that have access to interact with this genie.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the genie was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the genie was last updated.

SkillRef.title: Skill Reference
SkillRef.description: A reference to a skill assigned to a genie.

description.description: Description of the capability this skill provides the genie.

recipe_id.description: ID of the underlying recipe that implements this skill.

KnowledgeBaseRef.title: Knowledge Base Reference
KnowledgeBaseRef.description: A reference to a knowledge base assigned to a genie.

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base.

name.description: Display name of the knowledge base.

source_type.description: The type of data sources used in the knowledge base.

UserGroupRef.title: User Group Reference
UserGroupRef.description: A reference to an identity provider user group.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user group.

name.description: Display name of the user group.

DataSource.title: Data Source
DataSource.description: A configured data source that feeds information into a knowledge base.

id.description: Unique identifier of the data source.

connection_id.description: ID of the Workato connection used to authenticate to the data source.

config.description: Source-specific configuration including paths, queries, or selectors.

sync_frequency.description: How often the data source is synchronized.

McpServer.title: MCP Server
McpServer.description: A Model Context Protocol server that exposes Workato API collections as tools for external AI agents.

handle.description: Unique slug identifier of the MCP server.

name.description: Display name of the MCP server.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this MCP server.

mcp_url.description: The authenticated MCP URL for AI agents to connect to.

authentication_method.description: Authentication method used by the MCP server.

tools.description: List of tools (API endpoints) exposed through this MCP server.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the MCP server was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the MCP server was last updated.

McpTool.title: MCP Tool
McpTool.description: An individual API endpoint exposed as a callable tool through an MCP server.

id.description: Unique identifier of the tool within its application.

name.description: Display name of the tool shown to AI agents.

description.description: Description of what the tool does and when AI agents should use it.

trigger_application.description: The application or API collection that owns this tool.

ServerPolicy.title: Server Policy
ServerPolicy.description: Security and rate limiting policies for an MCP server.

ip_allowlist.description: IP addresses or CIDR ranges permitted to access the server.

ip_denylist.description: IP addresses or CIDR ranges blocked from accessing the server.
